go test ./...

-- go.mod --
module example.com/enumimport

go 1.28

-- timer/model.go --
package timer

import "time"

type Key enum {
	Chat
}

func ChatKey() Key {
	return Key.Chat{}
}

func (key Key) Duration() time.Duration {
	switch key {
	case Chat:
		return 3 * time.Second
	default:
		panic("should never happen")
	}
}

-- timer/service.go --
package timer

type Service struct {
	values map[Key]int
}

func (service *Service) Remaining(key Key) int {
	return service.values[key]
}

-- chat/chat.go --
package chat

import "example.com/enumimport/timer"

func Duration() int64 {
	service := &timer.Service{}
	return int64(timer.ChatKey().Duration()) + int64(service.Remaining(timer.ChatKey()))
}
